ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Ahlada Engineers Limited has filed a routine regulatory certificate confirming the non-applicability of SEBI Regulation 74(5) for the quarter ended June 30, 2026. This is because the company's entire issued share capital is held in dematerialized form, and no requests for physical-to-demat or demat-to-physical share transfers were received during the period. This indicates efficient share management and a fully electronic shareholder base, with no material adverse impacts or red flags identified.
